overall_comment: Self-review (no subagent available in this environment): both required figures present, well-resolved, with metric annotations, baseline comparison, and style-guide-compliant palette.

issues.issue: panel (c) legend sits in the lower-right where some baseline residual points lie close
issues.fix: move legend to upper-right or place outside axes if regenerating

reason: Agent(subagent_type=figure-critic) tool not available in this orbit-agent runtime (no spawnable subagent surface in this Claude Code harness). Self-review against agents/figure-critic.md rubric performed instead. Both required artifacts (narrative.png, results.png) verified by reading the rendered PNGs back: layout clean, fonts readable, metric annotated inline, baseline contrast obvious, palette matches research/style.md, no overlapping/clipped text on any panel.
